message:
feat(cli): add --explain and --format flags to test command

Add ability to use explain/trace output mode from `dcg test` by passing
--explain. When enabled, delegates to the same handler as `dcg explain`
for detailed decision tracing.

- Add `explain: bool` field to TestCommand struct
- Add `format: ExplainFormat` field with default "pretty"
- Delegate to handle_explain when --explain is passed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
